untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a trained machine learning forecasting model (Logistic Regression, LDA, SVM, or Random Forest) with predicted probability outputs. This model-based prediction mechanism cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. The signal depends on external model predictions rather than calculated technical indicators.
translation_notes: The entry condition attempts to map the 65% confidence threshold to the returns indicator as a proxy, but this is fundamentally inadequate. The core logic requires: (1) a pre-trained ML model with lagged return features, (2) real-time probability predictions from that model, and (3) comparison against dynamic thresholds (65% entry, 55% exit). The backtest engine would need to integrate an external ML model scoring system to properly implement this signal. Exit conditions include probability threshold (55%), stop loss (-2%), and profit target (+3%).
